watch.description: Plugin list page — detects new framework/tool plugins

updates.description: Major version bump — breaking changes likely
updates.commitMessage: chore(tl-knip): flag for review — Knip major version bump ({version})

updates.description: Minor version bump — new features or plugins
New plugin added to Knip's plugin reference
updates.commitMessage: chore(tl-knip): flag for review — plugin list changed in Knip {version}

reviewInstructions.description: What to check when a human reviews a flagged update
steps: Read the GitHub release notes at https://github.com/webpro-nl/knip/releases
Check if any CLI flags, config options, or defaults changed — update references/configuration.md if so
Check if new plugins were added — update references/plugins.md plugin tables
Check if barrel file / re-export behavior changed — update references/barrel-files.md if so
Check if any SKILL.md quick commands or workflow steps are affected
Update metadata.version in SKILL.md frontmatter after review is complete

toolConfig.description: Seed config for the platform tools table — insert this record to activate watching
toolConfig.name: knip-release-watcher
